title: dombeya rotundifolia
intro: Dombeya rotundifolia, also known as the wild pear or rock pear, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Sterculiaceae family. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dombeya rotundifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and bark in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent like ethanol.
